text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after watching the race with
Tazuna...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hello again, Trainer! Welcome to the
Japan Umamusume Training Center
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This is the finest Umamusume training
establishment in Japan, home to countless
students who dream of the racing world!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, Director Akikawa! You scared
us!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Apologies! Seeing such a promising new
trainer just gets me so excited!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Introductions! I am Akikawa, the director
of this academy! I look forward to your
endeavors, newcomer!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: But first... Please! Tell us about yourself!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Welcome!
Trainer <username>,
from here on, you are a part of
Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
High hopes! I expect you'll give your all
together with your trainees to make their
dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The goal of our academy's students is to
participate in the highly renowned
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
So I want you, Trainer, to teach, guide,
and support your trainees through and
through!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That's all! I hope that you will work
diligently to bring honor to the trainer
badge you wear on your chest!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's set off for the introduction
course,
Trainer <username>!
